identity.name: Tennis Buddies Club
identity.archetype: The Performance Pro (Softened with Vibrant Play)
key_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Scoreboard Aesthetics with Social Network warmth
Emotion First: Every screen should feel like 'Game Day'
Content is King: The Match Schedule is the hero

primary.description: Deep Court Blue - The anchor color for headers and primary structures

secondary.description: Volt / Tennis Ball Yellow - Use for Primary CTAs, Active States, and Highlights

accent.description: Clay Court Orange - Use for Alerts, Deconstructive actions, or 'Live' badges

usage_rules: Use Volt Yellow for 'Play', 'Join', or 'Winner' states
Use Court Blue for 'Admin', 'Save', or 'Confirm' states
Backgrounds should be mostly White or very pale Grey (#F8F9FA)
Text on Volt Yellow must be Dark Blue/Black (#002040) for contrast

layout.spacing_scale: Generous (2x standard). Use p-8 for cards, p-12 for sections.

buttons.primary: bg-[#CCFF00] text-[#002040] hover:bg-[#B3E600] rounded-full font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-8 py-3 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-[#0051BA] text-[#0051BA] hover:bg-[#0051BA] hover:text-white rounded-full font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-8 py-3 transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-[#0051BA] hover:bg-[#0051BA]/10 rounded-lg font-medium px-4 py-2

cards.match_card: bg-white border border-gray-100 rounded-xl p-6 relative overflow-hidden group
cards.stat_card: bg-gray-50 border-none rounded-2xl p-6 flex flex-col items-start justify-between

inputs.default: h-12 bg-white border-gray-200 focus:border-[#0051BA] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0051BA]/20 rounded-lg transition-all

navigation.style: Floating island or solid sticky header
navigation.link_active: text-[#0051BA] font-bold relative after:content-[''] after:absolute after:bottom-[-4px] after:left-0 after:w-full after:h-[2px] after:bg-[#CCFF00]

textures: Noise overlay (opacity 0.02) on all solid backgrounds
Court Lines: White lines on colored backgrounds

image_strategy.style: High shutter speed (frozen action), sunlight, harsh shadows, close-ups of equipment
image_strategy.overlay: No dark overlays on full images. Use gradient fade from bottom if text is needed.

hero_serving.desc: Artistic shadow of tennis player serving on clay. Use for Hero or Login.

hero_court_aerial.desc: Aerial view of courts. Use for Schedule or Ladder background headers.

coach_teaching.desc: Coach instructing player. Use for Education/Coaching section.

equipment_detail.desc: Tennis ball on net. Use for decorative cards or footer.

doubles_action.desc: Action shot of doubles play. Use for Landing Page 'Join Us' section.

3d_strategy.use_case: Minimal. Use only if requested for 'Court Strategy' board.
3d_strategy.library: None required for MVP. Stick to high-quality 2D.

global_css_rules: Remove all default 'App.css' styles that center text
Ensure all buttons have hover states defined

colors.primary: 0 0% 9% (Tailwind default is fine, but override with our Blue for specific components)

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure white text is only used on Dark Blue (#0051BA) or Black. Never on Yellow.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible thick outline (ring-2) for keyboard nav

universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
